signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: We've been really in that consistent range... nothing that we'd call out that we're seeing as a change in member behavior... our value is resonating with them.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We estimate capital expenditure for the full year will be approximately $6.5 billion... we are making additional investments to support a higher number of new warehouse openings, increased warehouse remodels, depot network expansion, and digital.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: KS items typically offering 15 to 20% value compared to the national brand alternative with equal or better quality... our goal is to be the first to lower prices when we see opportunities to do so.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: Our average sales have been around that six and a half percent growth... really in that consistent range... there's a lot of consistency actually in what we're seeing.
